examName: RRB ALP CBT-II Exam City Details 2026
Details: has released the CBT-II Exam City Details on its official website for the  recruitment of Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) posts. The exam will be conducted on 28 July 2026, and the last date to submit the application form was 19 May 2025. Candidates can check their CBT-II Exam City Details using their Enrollment Number, Registration Number, or Date of Birth by logging into the portal. The direct links are provided below. (CEN – 01/2025)
overAllEligiblityDetails:
Candidates must have passed 10th grade along with an ITI certificate in the relevant trade or hold a Diploma/Degree in Engineering in the respective field.
        For Zone-wise eligibility, check the official notification.
